title: rubus × scrupeiformis
intro: Rubus × scrupeiformis, also known as the hybrid bramble, is a cross between the Rubus armeniacus and Rubus fruticosus species of plants. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of ellagic acid, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × scrupeiformis include its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × scrupeiformis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support overall well-being and prevent chronic diseases.
